title: Corticosteroids for treatment of sore throat: systematic review and meta-analysis of randomised trials
notes: PMID 28931508; PMCID PMC5605780. Adjunct corticosteroid evidence in people aged 5 or older, commonly in emergency/clinical settings. Not mapped to a self-care recommendation; treatment requires clinical assessment. PubMed XML contained no correction/retraction or conflict statement.
